name: Nicole Lockett
title: Immigration Attorney
bio:
Nicole Lockett is an immigration attorney at Watson Immigration Law with a deep commitment to helping individuals and businesses navigate the complexities of U.S. immigration law. She brings a client-centered approach to every case, ensuring that each client fully understands their options and feels supported throughout the immigration process.

Nicole works closely with employers, professionals, and families across a wide range of immigration matters, including employment-based visas, investor visas, and adjustment of status proceedings. Her attention to detail and thorough case preparation have earned her a reputation for excellence among clients and colleagues alike.

Prior to joining Watson Immigration Law, Nicole gained valuable experience in immigration law that has equipped her to handle both straightforward and complex immigration cases with confidence and precision.
